chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No.D- 361 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1. For orders on CMA 1651/23 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA 1652/23 4. For Hearing of Main Case 07-03-2023 Mr. Hamid Ali Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner contends that this petition may be disposed of in view of order dated 10.01.2023, passed by this Bench in C.P.No.D-65 of 2023 (available at page-37 of this petition). According to petitioner, she applied for the post of Primary School Teacher (PST) and recruitment process for such purpose was carried out by Sindh University Testing Center, but she was not considered. On the same facts, other petitioners filed aforesaid petition, hence he would be satisfied if this petition be disposed of on similar directions. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of by directing the Secretary, School Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh to refer the case of petitioner to the Grievance Redressal Committee to examine the case of the petitioner thoroughly as well as conduct fresh test by the Committee and pass speaking order. During scrutiny and test, if the petitioner is found qualified to the post, she applied for, then she shall be accommodated against said post. This exercise shall be completed within two months from the date of receipt of this order under compliance report to this Court through Additional Registrar. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
